runs.summary: First nightly cycle. Skills optimization, script robustness, memory consolidation.
Skills clarity (tables vs prose), script refactoring (apt helper), memory clean.
Consolidate duplicate setup sections (checkpoint), fix typo + checklist table (pr-review). Descending returns.
Completeness + robustness: skills (troubleshooting), scripts (error handling), memory (current refs + health goals). Streak continues.
Skills consolidation (sonoscli grouping, checkpoint setup table, pr-review task prompt), script robustness (garmin-historical-analysis deps). Memory/Scripts stabilized.

skills/proactive-agent/SKILL.md.change: Six Pillars + Best Practices → Quick Reference table

skills/verification-before-completion/SK.change: Red Flags + Rationalization → Danger Signals table

skills/video-frames/SKILL.md.change: Complete Command Reference, Usage Tips, Troubleshooting

scripts/usage-report.sh.change: Error handling, dependency checks, directory validation

scripts/garmin-check-alerts.sh.change: Env validation, module check, error messages

memory/INDEX.md.change: Update timestamps, fix stale references, reflect current structure

memory/manu-profile.md.change: Tech stack update, health goals, communication preferences

notes: Four consecutive nightly cycles. Pattern: completeness/robustness improvements with surgical commits. Workspace healthy, no bloat.
